company_name.japanese: 大和総研ビジネス・イノベーション株式会社
company_name.english: Daiwa Institute of Research Business Innovation Ltd.

status_details: Company was merged back into parent company 株式会社大和総研 in 2021 and no longer exists as a separate entity

personnel.note: Due to the 2021 merger and the nature of subsidiary operations, specific personnel records for DIRBI are not publicly available. All former DIRBI personnel were integrated into the parent company.

key_executives.note: Historical executive information for DIRBI is not publicly available in consolidated records.

parent_company_executives.note: During DIRBI's existence (2008-2021), it operated under the oversight of 株式会社大和総研 executives. Current executive information is available on the parent company's website.

contact_for_information.company: 株式会社大和総研 (Daiwa Institute of Research Ltd.)

organizational_structure.parent_company: 株式会社大和総研 (Daiwa Institute of Research Ltd.)
organizational_structure.group: 大和証券グループ (Daiwa Securities Group)

merger_history.event: 大和総研 split into three companies, DIRBI was founded
ファイテックフォース (FaitecForce) merged into DIRBI
DIRBI merged back into parent company 大和総研 along with other subsidiaries

employee_count.note: Employee count not publicly available for DIRBI specifically. Following the 2021 merger, all former DIRBI employees became employees of 株式会社大和総研.
employee_count.parent_company_context: 株式会社大和総研 has thousands of employees across Research, Consulting, and System business divisions.

current_employment.details: All former DIRBI employees are now part of 株式会社大和総研
current_employment.recruitment: For current employment opportunities in the former DIRBI business areas, refer to 株式会社大和総研 recruitment pages:
